description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with light green, layered hair and pale skin, dressed in a black two-piece outfit. The top is a frilled bandeau with a crescent moon motif at the center, while the bottom is a matching bikini-style garment with white ribbon ties at the hips. The doll wears thigh-high black stockings adorned with subtle patterns and black shoes. The facial features are large and anime-inspired, with expressive green eyes and a small mouth. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on fantasy or anime aesthetics.
description: A stylized humanoid doll with green hair, black frilled two-piece outfit, thigh-high stockings, and black shoes, featuring anime-inspired facial features.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the green hair, frilled top, ribbon ties, and the back of the stockings and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side details of the outfit and stockings.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, crescent moon motif on the top, and the full design of the outfit and stockings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the side details of the outfit and stockings.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a black frilled bandeau top with a crescent moon motif and a matching black bikini-style bottom with white ribbon ties at the hips, complemented by thigh-high black stockings with subtle patterns and black shoes. The style is reminiscent of modern anime or fantasy character fashion, with a playful and slightly gothic influence.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms extended outward in a T-pose, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical, suitable for display or rigging.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with large, open green eyes, a small closed mouth, and relaxed eyebrows, conveying a calm and composed demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, layered, and slightly tousled hair with a gradient from light green at the top to darker green at the tips, styled in a modern anime fashion.
